Operation 'getRealtimeStats' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary is vague about what 'specified time' means. Description lacks clarity about what data is returned and the response format. Added explicit mention of the timestamp parameter behavior, clarified the return value (RealtimeResponse), and improved specificity for AI agent understanding of when to use this operation versus the other real-time endpoints.

data.current_summary: Get real-time data from specified time
data.current_description: Retrieves real-time analytics for a specific reporting period. Using 0 as the timestamp returns data for the most recent complete second.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve real-time analytics for specified timestamp
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves real-time analytics data for a specific timestamp. Pass timestamp_in_seconds to specify the reporting period; using 0 returns data for the most recent complete second. Returns a RealtimeResponse object containing real-time metrics for the specified service and time period.
data.reasoning: Original summary is vague about what 'specified time' means. Description lacks clarity about what data is returned and the response format. Added explicit mention of the timestamp parameter behavior, clarified the return value (RealtimeResponse), and improved specificity for AI agent understanding of when to use this operation versus the other real-time endpoints.
